seo.title: Memoh Desktop - Download for macOS, Windows & Linux
seo.description: Download the Memoh desktop app for macOS (Apple Silicon & Intel), Windows, and Linux. Run your Agent OS natively on your computer.

desktop.title: Memoh on your desktop
desktop.subtitle: Run your agent workspace completely on your own computer. Built for macOS, Windows and Linux, with local files and services staying on your machine.

seo.title: Download Memoh Desktop - macOS, Windows & Linux
seo.description: Pick the Memoh desktop installer for your system. Available for macOS (Apple Silicon & Intel), Windows, and Linux.

download.title: Download Memoh
download.subtitle: Available for macOS, Windows, and Linux.

seo.title: Memoh — The multi-agent platform
seo.description: Every agent gets its own cloud computer with a desktop, filesystem, and network. Always on, always there.

hero.title: someone who stays
hero.subtitle:
Memoh is the multi-agent platform — each one lives in a computer of its own
right here, waiting for you

s1.title: A computer of its own
s1.subtitle: Every agent gets a desktop, a filesystem, and a network — not a chat window, a real computer that stays on.

c1.title: Its own desktop
c1.desc: A full graphical desktop where it browses and works.

c2.title: Its own files
c2.desc: A persistent filesystem of its own — notes, downloads, workspace.

c3.title: Its own network
c3.desc: Isolated networking. It goes online on its own terms.

s2.title: Always on, even when you're not
s2.subtitle: It runs in the cloud. Your laptop sleeps — it doesn't. When something needs your attention, it finds you.

c1.title: Runs on its own
c1.desc: Scheduled tasks and check-ins, no human trigger needed.

c2.title: Reaches out first
c2.desc: When something matters, it messages you first.

c3.title: Picks up where it left off
c3.desc: Sessions don't reset. It continues from last time.
